basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate-II (Workforce Development) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website. The last date to submit the application form is 31-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E./M.S. or equivalent in appropriate discipline, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc or equivalent with minimum 02 years post-qualification experience and 60% marks from class 10th onwards
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E./M.S. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualification will be a minimum 60% or equivalent grade from class 10th onwards.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-II (Workforce Development) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a M.Tech./M.E./M.S. or equivalent in an appropriate discipline, or a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc or equivalent with at least 2 years of post-qualification experience and 60% marks from class 10th onwards.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 78,000 per month, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification. This makes the application process more accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-II (Workforce Development) post at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official IIT Gandhinagar website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-II is on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.
